description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yosef ha-Kohen, in Dalton (Dallāta), to Hillel he-Ḥaver b. Yeshuʿa ha-Ḥazzan, in Tiberias. Dating: approximately 1030. Discusses fees for copying of manuscripts. The addressee was owed a quarter dinar, which the sender sent to Qedesh (Assaf argues that this is actually a reference to Jerusalem, but Breslavi's reading of Qedesh in the Upper Galilee seems more persuasive). Mentions R. Yiṣḥaq and Ibrāhīm b. Salmān.
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן יוסף הכהן, בדלתון, להלל החבר בן ישועה החזן, בטבריה, בערך 1030. דן בשכר העתקת כתבי יד.
